title: Bridge Essay: Regional Homogeneity Predicts Creative Insight: A Resting-State fMRI Study.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Regional, Homogeneity, Predicts, Creative, Insight:.

**Regional Homogeneity Predicts Creative Insight: A Resting-State fMRI Study.** — Front Hum Neurosci. PMID: 29875645. DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2018.00210. Creative insight plays an important role in our daily life. Previous studies have investigated the neural correlates of creative insight by functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI), however, the intrinsic resting-state brain activity associated with creative insight is still unclear. In the present study, we used regional homogeneity (ReHo) as an index in resting-state fMRI (rs-fMRI) to identify brain regions involved in individual differences in creative insight, which was compued by the re
